characters.description: The original replicant continues watching over the Deltans from orbit. He and Marvin investigate the unexplained losses in their history while he cautiously offers practical help to their settlement.
characters.name: Bob

characters.description: Bob's replicant colleague at Delta Eridani. He studies the Deltans' migration and the disturbing gap between their former population and the remains they left behind.
characters.name: Marvin

characters.description: Camelot's medicine woman, protective of her authority and initially resistant to outside interference. She accepts Bob's method of cleaning wounds with boiled water after a hunter is injured.
characters.name: Cruella

characters.description: The replicant directing construction, food production, and defensive preparations for the human settlement on Vulcan. He must balance colonization schedules against a hostile native ecosystem.
characters.name: Howard

characters.description: Vulcan's security chief. After raptors attack the settlement perimeter, he asks Howard for wider surveillance coverage and helps shape the colony's response to local threats.
characters.name: Stéphane Brodeur

characters.description: The leader of the USC colony effort on Vulcan. He keeps most passengers in stasis until farms and defenses are ready, putting settlement safety ahead of a rapid landing schedule.
characters.name: Colonel George Butterworth

characters.description: A gifted young Deltan toolmaker and Bob's principal contact in Camelot. He studies flintknapping with Moses and shows an unusual ability to turn instruction into practical advances.
characters.name: Archimedes

characters.description: A Deltan closely associated with Archimedes. She distrusts Bob's hovering machines and reacts to them with open hostility.
characters.name: Diana

characters.description: An elder Deltan toolmaker whose health is declining. He continues teaching Archimedes the craft of flintknapping.
characters.name: Moses

characters.description: A Deltan warrior skilled in teaching the use of spears.
characters.name: Arnold

characters.description: The replicant surveying Eta Cassiopeiae. He identifies a habitable ocean planet with floating ecosystems and begins assessing the demanding path toward a human colony there.
characters.name: Mulder

characters.description: One of Bob's earliest independent copies and a returning research partner.
characters.name: Bill

characters.description: One of Bob's early independent copies and the coordinator of humanity's evacuation from Earth. He manages orbital infrastructure and the competing demands of threatened human communities.
characters.name: Riker

characters.description: A returning Bob who works with Bill.
characters.name: Garfield

characters.description: A returning explorer operating far beyond the settled systems. His surveys place him in a position to detect threats before they reach the rest of the network.
characters.name: Mario

characters.description: A Sol-system replicant who supports Riker's security work. He tracks attacks on food and civilian infrastructure as the evacuation crisis worsens.
characters.name: Charles

characters.description: A radical organization attacking food production as part of a campaign to eliminate humanity.
characters.name: Vehement

characters.description: Riker's returning partner in orbital industry and food production. His work is central to keeping Earth's remaining population alive while colony ships are prepared.
characters.name: Homer

characters.description: The leader of the Faith settlement on Romulus. He rejects Howard's authority and resists sharing resources with the neighboring colonies.
characters.name: Minister Cranston

characters.description: An unknown civilization first evident through sterilized worlds, dismantled cities, and missing metals. Its systematic harvesting has already destroyed life across multiple star systems.
characters.name: Others

characters.description: One of Mario’s newly created scout Bobs, assigned to search outward for the Others and report what he finds.
characters.name: Bashful

characters.description: Archimedes and Diana's son. He is still young when Archimedes describes his early attempts to learn the family's toolmaking skills.
characters.name: Buster

characters.description: A Vulcan biologist working with Howard on the colony's ecological hazards. She looks for biological controls for an invasive poisonous vine and studies which native animals may be safe to eat.
characters.name: Dr. Sheehy

characters.description: The Vulcan biologist previously introduced as Dr. Sheehy. She develops a noninvasive way to detect the colony's dangerous parasite and works closely with Howard and Stéphane during another raptor breach.
characters.name: Bridget

characters.description: An associate from Bob's time on Eden who left to explore distant systems.
characters.name: Luke

characters.description: An associate from Eden who left to explore distant systems.
characters.name: Bender

characters.description: A newly created replicant who follows Bender's route while sending continuing status reports.
characters.name: Victor

characters.description: A returning Bob explorer operating beyond the established network.
characters.name: Linus

characters.description: A psychologically fragile Australian replicant recovered and supported by Linus. He joins a protected part of BobNet while continuing to struggle with panic and confinement-related fear.
characters.name: Henry Roberts

characters.description: An explorer testing the defenses around the hostile civilization's territory. He uses stealth, decoys, and deliberate transmissions to learn how its ships detect and pursue intruders.
characters.name: Hal

characters.description: The architect of the replicant technology and the director of Vehement's campaign against the Bobs. He presents his actions as retaliation for losing control of his invention.
characters.name: Vickers

characters.description: Vickers's associate, implicated in the financial grievance behind the campaign against the Bobs. Riker leaves him alive under a direct warning against further action.
characters.name: Gerald

characters.description: The replicant who takes over Howard's local responsibilities on Vulcan, maintaining support for the colony after Howard leaves to explore.
characters.name: Dexter

characters.description: A returning replicant with combat and engineering experience.
characters.name: Elmer

characters.description: An explorer approaching Gamma Pavonis as the network tries to determine which systems the Others may target next.
characters.name: Claude

characters.description: An explorer bound for Delta Pavonis while Bill assesses the likely path of the Others' next expansion. He is the network's prospective presence in that threatened system.
characters.name: Jacques

characters.description: A newly created, Bill-derived replicant at Alpha Centauri. He begins by multiplying printers and factories, with advanced warship production as his central objective.
characters.name: Oliver

characters.description: The replicant left in charge of Poseidon's established floating colonies. He oversees the move toward permanent cities and tests an aerial settlement design.
characters.name: Marcus

characters.description: A Poseidon associate returning toward Earth with biological samples.
characters.name: Monty

characters.description: An industrial-age intelligent people native to Delta Pavonis. Jacques begins observing their societies while preparing for the possibility that the advancing Others will reach them.
characters.name: Pav

characters.description: A prototype human-shaped android prepared on Vulcan for Howard to operate. Its purpose is to give a distant replicant direct physical senses and presence.
characters.name: Manny

characters.description: Bob's Deltan-form android, used to enter Camelot without revealing his identity.
characters.name: Charlie

characters.description: One of two newly activated replicants assigned to carry out the emergency removal of Pav civilians before the Others reach their world.
characters.name: Phineas

characters.description: One of two newly activated replicants assigned to collect Pav civilians for emergency evacuation ahead of the Others' arrival.
characters.name: Ferb
